title: Create a calendar view on a board, that is color coded by the due date

posts.author: dashevsky (Rachel Dashevsky)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to create a calendar view on a board, that is color coded by the due date.

Currently the chart is color coded by the status of the item.

A_ I would like to have an option to color an item ‘red’ for items with a due date within 0-3 days & status has not been marked as “done/ completed” > and ‘Dark red’ for items with a due date ‘past due’ and has not been marked as “done/ completed”

B_ I would like to have an option to color an item “yellow” when the due date is within 1.5 weeks from the due date (12-4 days before), and has a status that has not yet been marked as “done/ completed”

C_ I would like to have item marked in “Green” when the status has been “completed”

Thank you for taking the time to read this!

Best,
Rachel

posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml:
This can be done by setting up a Due status column, and calculating trigger dates that, when they arrive, update the Due status column.

Result

1. Board structure

Board structure1537×398 33.9 KB

2. Automations

2.1. Due date calculation

Set up automations to calculate the Due soon on and Imminently due on dates. Adjust as necessary for your situation. I’ve opted for due soon = 3 business days, imminently due = 1 business day.

Use Calendar Plus or Automato:


Calendar Plus offers a calendar replacement, if you’re interested, and Automato is purely focussed on automations and will be cheaper or even free.

2.2. Conditional due date arrivals

When these due dates arrive, unless the task is completed, set the corresponding due status. The condition ensures tasks will not be coloured orange/red when they’re already completed.

When Due soon on arrives_nand only if Status is not Done Then set Due status to Due soon(2)700×164 4.48 KB

When Imminently due on arrives and only if Status is not Done Then set Due status to Imminently due700×164 5.51 KB

2.3. Set due status to OK when tasks is completed

Finally, the due status should turn green when the tasks is completed.

When Status changes to Done Then set Due status to OK700×128 3.51 KB

–

Adjust as necessary!
